prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第67名，近年排名在54–67之间波动，整体处于中上211 水平；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第68，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录，报考心理整体平稳；安全科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-，矿业工程为传统王牌，与招生专业中的安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木类等高度关联。 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，中国矿业大学在上述领域均有招生，对考生吸引力较强；湖北省2026年普通高考 总人数约39.37万，较2025年（约39.12万）略有增加，物理类占比按近年约63%估算约24.8万人，竞争基数扩大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州，属长三角地区， 对湖北考生有一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次21489、2026年大幅扩招20%导致竞争加剧、湖 北省考生总数小幅增加、学校软科排名略有下降等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年有所后移；预测最低位次约24088名，区间23588–24588名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18452 → 18293 → 18018 → 24681 → 21489. In 2024, there was a significant drop (24681), and in 2025 it rebounded to 21489. Over the past 5 years, fluctuations have been large, with the 2025 baseline around 21489. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province Physics Category was 112 in 2021, 109 in 2022, 108 in 2023, 109 in 2024, and 115 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 138, an increase of 23 students (approximately 20%) compared to 2025, indicating a relatively large expansion and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities 2026 approximately 67th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 54 and 67, overall at the upper-middle level of 211 universities. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents. Douyin popularity ranking 68th, evaluation as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms. No obvious record of enrollment gaps, overall application psychology stable. Safety Science and Engineering A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Mining Engineering is a traditional flagship, highly correlated with enrollment majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering. Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., continue to be highly recommended hot majors. China University of Mining and Technology has enrollment in the above fields, which is attractive to candidates. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is approximately 393,700, slightly increased from 2025 (approximately 391,200). The proportion of Physics Category, estimated at about 63% in recent years, is approximately 248,000 people, expanding the competition base.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, part of the Yangtze River Delta region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Hubei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 21489, the significant 20% enrollment expansion in 2026 leading to intensified competition, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei Province, and a slight decline in the university's Shanghai Ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24088, with a range of 23588–24588.

- Electronic Information Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Safety Science and Engineering (Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, Occupational Health Engineering, Emergency Technology and Management)
- Mining Engineering (Intelligent Mining Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Mining Engineering, Industrial Engineering)
- Surveying and Mapping Engineering (Surveying and Mapping Engineering, Geographic Information Science)
- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutics (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23588–24588, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., within 23500), focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science. For rankings near the lower limit (around 24500), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Safety Science and Engineering (A+ discipline) or Mining Engineering and other characteristic advantageous majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4011 → 4258 → 4236 → 4361 → 4222. Over the past 5 years, the ranking fluctuated narrowly between 4011 and 4361, remaining stable around 4200. The baseline for 2025 is about 4222. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 19 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 16, an increase of 1 (about 6.7%) compared to 2025, indicating a slight expansion and slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Ranked approximately 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with some appeal to liberal arts students. Its 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 68th, rated as average, with moderate exposure. No abnormal filing records have been observed, and the application psychology is stable. The university's advantageous disciplines are mainly engineering (Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-), while the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Finance, English, German, Network and New Media, Business Administration, Public Administration) have low correlation with these advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but fierce competition; Chinese Language and Literature is recommended; Finance/Finance/Economics is divided and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Province General College Entrance Examination is approximately 393,700, with the History Category proportion estimated at about 36% based on recent years, roughly 141,700 people, basically unchanged from 2025 (about 141,400). China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, part of the Yangtze River Delta region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Hubei liberal arts students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4222, a slight enrollment expansion of 6.7% in 2026, a basically unchanged total number of candidates, and stable university reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4406, with a range of 3906 to 4906.
